interactive_prompts.name: auth_recheck
interactive_prompts.regex: Authentication required|Please log in|Sign in to (Antigravity|Google|Gemini)|Login expired
interactive_prompts.note: Bridge cannot complete OAuth/Google login; escalate to operator

interactive_prompts.name: quota_exhausted
interactive_prompts.note: Distinguishable from transient rate-limit; usually requires plan upgrade

interactive_prompts.name: permission_prompt
interactive_prompts.note: Belt-and-suspenders alongside --dangerously-skip-permissions; harmless if bypass already accepted it

note: agy is Antigravity, Gemini-backed (NOT Anthropic). agy CLI exposes no model selection flag (-c is --continue, not --config). Per operator directive 2026-05-21: all Claude tier aliases map to agy's default (gemini-3.5-flash). Cost-leak guards: GEMINI_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY.
